audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Deuteronomy / Devarim covenant blessing-and-curse discourse, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for covenant blessings, agricultural abundance, national elevation, escalating disease and ecological curses, defeat, sexual violence, family loss, siege cannibalism, mental anguish, exile, enslavement, and return-to-Egypt reversal. Maximum anti-trauma, anti-ableism, anti-antisemitism, anti-prosperity, and anti-victim-blaming safeguards required.

verses.restored: It shall be, if you diligently listen to voice of YHWH your Divine, keeping to do all his commands that I command you today, then YHWH your Divine will set you high above all nations of earth.
All these blessings shall come upon you and overtake you, because you listen to voice of YHWH your Divine.
Blessed shall you be in city, and blessed shall you be in field.
Blessed shall be fruit of your womb, fruit of your ground, fruit of your livestock, offspring of your cattle, and increase of your flock.
Blessed shall be your basket and your kneading bowl.
Blessed shall you be when you come in, and blessed shall you be when you go out.
YHWH will cause your enemies rising against you to be struck before you; by one way they shall come out to you, and by seven ways they shall flee before you.
YHWH will command blessing with you in your barns and in every undertaking of your hand, and he will bless you in land YHWH your Divine gives you.
YHWH will establish you for himself as holy people, as he swore to you, when you keep commands of YHWH your Divine and walk in his ways.
All peoples of earth shall see that name of YHWH is called upon you, and they shall fear you.
YHWH will make you abound for good, in fruit of your womb, fruit of your livestock, and fruit of your ground, upon ground YHWH swore to your fathers to give you.
YHWH will open for you his good treasury, heavens, to give rain of your land in its season and bless all work of your hand; you shall lend to many nations and shall not borrow.
YHWH will make you head and not tail; you shall be only above and not beneath, when you listen to commands of YHWH your Divine that I command you today, to keep and do,
and do not turn aside from any words I command you today, right or left, to go after other gods to serve them.
But it shall be, if you do not listen to voice of YHWH your Divine, to keep to do all his commands and statutes that I command you today, then all these curses shall come upon you and overtake you.
Cursed shall you be in city, and cursed shall you be in field.
Cursed shall be your basket and your kneading bowl.
Cursed shall be fruit of your womb, fruit of your ground, offspring of your cattle, and increase of your flock.
Cursed shall you be when you come in, and cursed shall you be when you go out.

YHWH will send against you curse, confusion, and rebuke in every undertaking of your hand that you do, until you are destroyed and perish quickly because of evil of your deeds by which you forsook me.
YHWH will make pestilence cling to you until it consumes you from ground where you are entering to possess it.
YHWH will strike you with wasting disease, fever, inflammation, burning heat, drought/sword, blight, and mildew; they shall pursue you until you perish.
Your heavens that are over your head shall be bronze, and earth beneath you iron.
YHWH will make rain of your land dust and powder; from heavens it shall come down upon you until you are destroyed.
YHWH will cause you to be struck before your enemies; by one way you shall go out to them, and by seven ways you shall flee before them, and you shall become a horror to all kingdoms of earth.
Your corpse shall become food for every bird of heavens and beast of earth, with none frightening them away.
YHWH will strike you with boil of Egypt, tumors, scurvy, and itch from which you cannot be healed.
YHWH will strike you with madness, blindness, and bewilderment of heart.
You shall grope at noon as blind person gropes in darkness, and you shall not make your ways prosper; you shall be only oppressed and robbed all days, with none saving.
A woman you shall betroth, and another man shall violate her; a house you shall build and not dwell in it; a vineyard you shall plant and not begin to enjoy it.

Your ox shall be slaughtered before your eyes and you shall not eat from it; your donkey shall be robbed from before your face and not return to you; your flock shall be given to your enemies, with none saving for you.
Your sons and daughters shall be given to another people, and your eyes shall see and fail with longing for them all day, but there shall be no power in your hand.
Fruit of your ground and all your labor a people you do not know shall eat, and you shall be only oppressed and crushed all days.
You shall become mad from sight of your eyes that you see.
YHWH will strike you on knees and legs with evil boils from which you cannot be healed, from sole of your foot even to crown of your head.
YHWH will lead you and your king whom you set over you to a nation you and your fathers did not know, and there you shall serve other gods, wood and stone.
You shall become astonishment, proverb, and byword among all peoples where YHWH leads you.
Much seed you shall bring out to field, but little you shall gather, for locust shall consume it.
Vineyards you shall plant and cultivate, but wine you shall not drink or gather, for worm shall eat them.
Olive trees shall be yours in all your territory, but oil you shall not anoint yourself with, for your olives shall drop off.
Sons and daughters you shall father, but they shall not be yours, for they shall go into captivity.
All your trees and fruit of your ground whirring locust shall possess.
Sojourner who is in your midst shall rise over you higher and higher, and you shall descend lower and lower.
He shall lend to you and you shall not lend to him; he shall be head and you shall be tail.

All these curses shall come upon you and pursue you and overtake you until you are destroyed, because you did not listen to voice of YHWH your Divine, to keep his commands and statutes that he commanded you.
They shall be upon you as sign and wonder, and upon your seed forever.
Because you did not serve YHWH your Divine with joy and goodness of heart from abundance of all things,
you shall serve your enemies whom YHWH sends against you, in hunger, thirst, nakedness, and lack of all things; he shall put iron yoke upon your neck until he destroys you.
YHWH will raise against you a nation from far, from end of earth, as eagle swoops, a nation whose language you do not understand,
a nation fierce of face, which does not lift face/show regard to old and does not show favor to young.

It shall eat fruit of your livestock and fruit of your ground until you are destroyed; it shall leave you no grain, new wine, oil, offspring of cattle, or increase of flock, until it causes you to perish.

It shall besiege you in all your gates until your high and fortified walls in which you trust fall throughout your land; it shall besiege you in all your gates throughout land YHWH your Divine gave you.
You shall eat fruit of your womb, flesh of your sons and daughters whom YHWH your Divine gave you, in siege and distress with which your enemy distresses you.
The man among you tender and very delicate, his eye shall be evil toward his brother, wife of his embrace, and remainder of children he leaves,
so as not to give to one of them from flesh of his children that he eats, because nothing remains to him, in siege and distress with which your enemy distresses you in all your gates.

The tender and delicate woman among you, who would not venture to set sole of her foot upon ground from delicateness and tenderness, her eye shall be evil toward husband of her embrace, her son, and her daughter,

and toward her afterbirth coming out from between her feet and her children whom she bears, for she shall eat them secretly for lack of all things, in siege and distress with which your enemy distresses you within your gates.
If you do not keep to do all words of this Torah/instruction written in this scroll, to fear/revere this glorious and fearsome name, YHWH your Divine,
then YHWH will make extraordinary your plagues and plagues of your seed, great and lasting plagues, and evil and lasting sicknesses.
He will bring back upon you every disease of Egypt before which you were afraid, and they shall cling to you.
Also every sickness and every plague not written in scroll of this Torah, YHWH will bring up upon you until you are destroyed.
You shall remain few in number, though you were like stars of heavens for multitude, because you did not listen to voice of YHWH your Divine.

It shall be, as YHWH rejoiced over you to do good to you and multiply you, so YHWH will rejoice over you to cause you to perish and destroy you; you shall be torn from upon ground where you enter to possess it.
YHWH will scatter you among all peoples, from one end of earth to other end of earth, and there you shall serve other gods you and your fathers did not know, wood and stone.
Among those nations you shall find no ease, and there shall be no resting place for sole of your foot; YHWH will give you there trembling heart, failing eyes, and languishing soul/life.
Your life shall hang in suspense before you; you shall fear night and day and not trust in your life.
In morning you shall say, Who will give evening? and in evening you shall say, Who will give morning? because of fear of your heart that you fear and sight of your eyes that you see.

YHWH will bring you back to Egypt in ships, by way of which I said to you, You shall never see it again; there you shall offer yourselves for sale to your enemies as male and female slaves, but there shall be no buyer.

translation_notes: The blessing section is covenant rhetoric about communal flourishing, not a prosperity guarantee that righteous individuals will always be wealthy, fertile, healthy, victorious, or safe.

The curse section is an escalating ancient treaty-warning and trauma catalogue involving ecological collapse, epidemic, disability imagery, robbery, sexual violence, child loss, siege starvation, cannibalism, captivity, psychological terror, exile, and enslavement.
No illness, disability, infertility, poverty, assault, war loss, displacement, or mental-health crisis should ever be treated as evidence that a sufferer disobeyed Divine command.

Blindness, madness, boils, and disease are used rhetorically as horrors in the ancient text; modern reception must reject ableism and stigma toward blind, disabled, neurodivergent, mentally ill, or chronically ill people.
Verse 30 includes sexual violation as a weapon of defeat. Survivors are never responsible for violence done to them.
Verses 53-57 preserve siege cannibalism as an atrocity of starvation and social collapse, not a Divine ideal or a basis for shaming parents trapped in famine.

The chapter has been weaponized in antisemitic and supersessionist traditions to portray Jewish suffering and exile as proof of Divine rejection. That use is categorically false to Jewish covenant continuity and must be rejected.
Serving with joy in verse 47 cannot be used to demand emotional performance from traumatized, depressed, grieving, disabled, or coerced people.
The return to Egypt reverses Exodus and depicts total loss of freedom; it does not legitimate slavery.
The chapter requires comparison with Deuteronomy 30, where return, compassion, restoration, and renewed life remain possible.
safety_note: Never use Deuteronomy 28 to tell sick, disabled, infertile, poor, assaulted, grieving, displaced, enslaved, traumatized, or war-affected people that they deserved their suffering. Never use it for antisemitism, supersessionism, prosperity preaching, disaster blame, coercive religion, sexual shaming, ableism, or justification of siege and collective punishment. Read the curses as ancient covenant catastrophe rhetoric whose human horrors must be prevented, relieved, and never reenacted.
